{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell is attempting a User Account Control (UAC) bypass by modifying the 'ms-settings' registry key to execute a hidden PowerShell command, followed by launching 'fodhelper.exe'. It also executes 'whoami /groups' for reconnaissance and stores a Base64 encoded command in the registry.",
  "indicators": [
    "UAC bypass",
    "fodhelper.exe abuse",
    "Registry modification for ms-settings protocol handler",
    "Hidden PowerShell execution",
    "Base64 encoded command in registry",
    "whoami /groups"
  ]
}
